skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: Diego has 8,000 reais he will convert to US dollars using a currency exchange service. At this time, the exchange rate is 1 real = 0.20 US dollars. The exchange service will charge Diego a 5% fee on the converted US dollar amount. How many US dollars will Diego receive after the fee is applied?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The converted amount is 8,000 × 0.20 = 1,600 US dollars. After the 5% fee, Diego receives 95% of 1,600, which is 0.95 × 1,600 = $1,520.

Choice A is incorrect and may result from taking a 10% fee. Choice B is incorrect and may result from rounding too aggressively. Choice C is incorrect and may result from adding the fee instead of subtracting it.
